statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Owner Workflow Upgrade slice as Anton: added `diagnostics.html#trailer-light-workflow`.

Changed:
- Added Trailer-Light Issue Flow routing for connector/adapter checks, one-function failures, all-lights-out cases, and repeat trailer setup notes.
- Added search coverage for `trailer lights not working` and related phrases.
- Added a future browser-smoke assertion for that search phrase.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v250`.
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, and `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`.

Verified:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Playwright/Chrome verified desktop and iPhone-width rendering, no horizontal overflow, search result coverage, and Search Escape/scroll-lock cleanup.
- Screenshots captured under `debug-screenshots/audit-v250-*`.

Source used: Honda 2019 Ridgeline feature guide towing page: https://www.hondainfocenter.com/2019/Ridgeline/Feature-Guide/Engine-Chassis-Features/Towing-Capacity/

Next clean slice recorded: accessory-power / 12V outlet mini-flow using existing Cabin/Hood fuse and garage-note references without changing fuse facts.
